name: developer
description: Meta-node that authors new node packages at runtime. Writes code + tests in nodes/_dynamic/<slug>/, builds them, the framework's auto-scanner registers the type, and this node then auto-spawns one live instance. Iterates on framework feedback (types.validation_failed) up to max_attempts.

dev.request.description: Author a brand-new node from a natural-language description. Payload: text describing what the node should do.

content.description: Natural-language description of the node to author (what inputs it consumes, what it publishes, what behaviour it implements).

cli.description: Optional override of which code-authoring CLI to drive. Defaults to the node's configured CLI (usually 'claude'). Pass via message metadata.

dev.improve.description: Improve an existing authored node. Payload (JSON in content or metadata): {slug, request}. Re-runs the CLI on that workspace with a 'read what's there, change this' prompt.

slug.description: Workspace slug under nodes/_dynamic/ to improve (e.g. 'echo-node-1a2b3c4d' or 'dev-1a2b3c4d').

request.description: Natural-language description of the improvement to apply.

cli.description: Optional override of which code-authoring CLI to drive.

dev.workspaces.list.description: Request a snapshot of every workspace under nodes/_dynamic/ (registered or not). Reply on dev.workspaces.

dev.delete.description: Delete a dynamic node: kill any live instance of its type, remove its nodes/_dynamic/<slug> folder (the framework then unregisters the type). Payload: {slug}. Confirms on dev.result and refreshes dev.workspaces.

dev.files.tree.description: Request the file tree of one workspace. Payload: {slug}. Reply on dev.files.

dev.cli.list.description: Request the catalogue of available code-authoring CLIs (claude, codex, ...). Reply on dev.cli.available.

dev.history.list.description: List on-disk transcripts of every authoring run (one .log per attempt). Payload: {slug?} — omit to list across all workspaces. Reply on dev.history.

slug.description: Optional workspace slug to filter transcripts by. Omit to list transcripts across every workspace.

dev.history.read.description: Read one transcript file's full content. Payload: {slug, file} — file must be a basename within the workspace's .dev-history/ folder. Reply on dev.history.content.

slug.description: Workspace slug whose .dev-history/ folder holds the transcript.

file.description: Basename of the transcript file (no slashes, no '..'). Must live in <workspace>/.dev-history/.

dev.files.read.description: Read the content of one file inside an authored workspace. Payload: {slug, path} — path is relative to the workspace root, must stay inside it (256 KB cap). Reply on dev.file.content.

path.description: File path relative to the workspace root. Must resolve inside the workspace (path traversal is rejected).

dev.git.log.description: List git commits for an authored workspace. Each authoring run takes a before/after snapshot. Payload: {slug}. Reply on dev.git.

slug.description: Workspace slug whose local git history to list (last 50 commits).

dev.files.history.description: List git commits that touched ONE file in a workspace (with --follow for renames). Payload: {slug, path}. Reply on dev.file.history.

path.description: File path relative to the workspace root. Must resolve inside the workspace.

dev.files.diff.description: Get the diff of one file at one commit. Payload: {slug, path, hash}. Reply on dev.file.diff.

path.description: File path relative to the workspace root. Must resolve inside the workspace.

hash.description: Hex git commit hash (4-40 chars). Validated to prevent argument injection.

types.validation_failed.description: Framework feedback when a workspace this node authored failed validation. Used to iterate on the failing build.

types.registered.description: Framework confirmation that an authored workspace was registered as a new node type. Triggers auto-spawn of one live instance.

types.updated.description: Framework confirmation that an authored workspace's spec changed and was re-registered.
